items.title: Grammar focus
items.body:
Use the structure from the workbook. Pay attention to word order, negatives, and questions.

Examples:
• Lesson 7
• I want. I go.
• I want to go with you. I want to go the movies.
• I want to speak only English. I want to go to the park.
• I want to play soccer. I want to go to school.

items.prompt: Eu quero ir com você.. Eu quero ir ao cinema.
items.answer: I want to go with you. I want to go the movies.

items.prompt: Eu quero falar só inglês. Eu quero ir ao parque.
items.answer: I want to speak only English. I want to go to the park.

items.prompt: Eu quero jogar futebol. Eu quero ir à escola.
items.answer: I want to play soccer. I want to go to school.

items.prompt: Eu quero dormir agora. Eu quero ir à igreja
items.answer: I want to sleep now. I want to go to church.

items.text: How do you spell your name?
